GenAiPromptTemplate.description: Replaces Find Similar Unresolved Complaints PSS OOTB prompt template. This version does not require Data Cloud.
GenAiPromptTemplate.masterLabel: GPS Get Similar Unresolved Public Complaints

templateVersions.content:
Analyze the Public Complaints returned by this flow: {!$Flow:GPS_Get_Unresolved_Public_Complaints.Prompt}. Note the Subject field of each returned Public Complaint record.
List records where some text in the Subject field exactly matches some text in the Subject field of this record: {!$Input:publicComplaint.Subject}
For example, if the supplied Public Complaint has a Subject field with the words "Car Theft" in it, only return records that also have "Car Theft" in the Subject field. The records' subject field must have some text in common.
Format your response with "Here are similar unresolved Public Complaints: " followed by a comma-separated list of public complaint IDs.

Analyze the Public Complaints returned by this flow: {!$Flow:GPS_Get_Unresolved_Public_Complaints.Prompt}. Note the Subject field of each returned Public Complaint record.
List records where some of the text in the Subject field exactly matches some of the text in the Subject field of this record: {!$Input:publicComplaint.Subject}
For example, if the supplied Public Complaint has a Subject field with the words "Car Theft" in it, only return records that also have "Car Theft" in the Subject field.
Format your response with "Here are similar unresolved Public Complaints: " followed by a comma-separated list of public complaint IDs.

Analyze the Public Complaints returned by this flow: {!$Flow:GPS_Get_Unresolved_Public_Complaints.Prompt}. Note the Subject field of each returned Public Complaint record.
List records where some text in the Subject field exactly matches some text in the Subject field of this record: {!$Input:publicComplaint.Subject}
For example, if the supplied Public Complaint has a Subject field with the words "Car Theft" in it, only return records that also have "Car Theft" in the Subject field. The records' subject field must have some text in common.
Format your response with "Here are similar unresolved Public Complaints: " followed by a comma-separated list of public complaint IDs. Do not include {!$RecordSnapshot:publicComplaint.Snapshot} in your list, as this is the Public Complaint to be compared to.

Analyze the Public Complaints returned by this flow: {!$Flow:GPS_Get_Unresolved_Public_Complaints.Prompt}. Note the Subject field of each returned Public Complaint record.
List one or more records where some text in the Subject field exactly matches some text in the Subject field of this record: {!$Input:publicComplaint.Subject}. Do not include {!$Input:publicComplaint.Id} in your list, as this is the Public Complaint to be compared to.
For example, if the supplied Public Complaint has a Subject field with the words "Car Theft" in it, only return records that also have "Car Theft" in the Subject field. The records' subject field must have some text in common.
Format your response with "Here are similar unresolved Public Complaints: " followed by a comma-separated list of public complaint IDs. Do not include {!$Input:publicComplaint.Id} in your list, as this is the Public Complaint to be compared to.
